description: Site-level publisher workflow experience only. Do not store credentials, emails, cookies, institution-specific secrets, or article-specific private notes here.

springer-nature.note: Smoke-tested; main PDF should be preferred over supplementary PDFs.

elsevier.note: Run one DOI prewarm when a fresh browser profile or network route is used.

geoscienceworld.note: Verify access in a regular browser first; do not treat access-side denial as an InstSci download failure.

onepetro.note: Cloudflare/WAF loops are likely; avoid bulk runs unless explicitly forced.
